title: Manufacturing Monday Use Discussion
excerpt:
Hey all, I am the admin for a manufacturing and wanted to see if any other manufacturing companies would be interested in connecting to discuss how you use Monday in your organization? 
For a little background on me and …

posts.author: cbenton (Christopher Benton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all, I am the admin for a manufacturing and wanted to see if any other manufacturing companies would be interested in connecting to discuss how you use Monday in your organization?

For a little background on me and the company I work for, we are a packaging manufacturer that uses Monday heavily to manage/track production, shipping, engineering work, sales leads, and more. We’ve been using Monday since late 2020 and have always built our boards based on what we need. I’m sure there are things we haven’t thought of or could be doing better. I would love to connect with others to see how your company is using Monday and share how we use it.

Just let me know if you’re interested and lets connect!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s awesome to hear about your extensive use of Monday in managing various facets of your packaging manufacturing operations. Connecting with other manufacturing companies can provide valuable insights and ideas on optimizing your use of Monday. Sharing experiences and strategies is a great way to discover new functionalities and improvements that you might not have considered yet.

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Chris, would like to connect. I am in Battery manufacturing.

posts.author: Scarletioshub (Scarletioshub)
posts.cookedHtml:
Christopher Benton:

Hey all, I am the admin for a manufacturing and wanted to see if any other manufacturing companies would be interested in connecting to discuss how you use Monday in your organization?

For a little background on me and the company I work for, we are a packaging manufacturer that uses Monday heavily to manage/track production, shipping, engineering work, sales leads, and more. We’ve been using Monday since late 2020 and have always built our boards based on what we need. I’m sure there are things we haven’t thought of or could be doing better. I would love to connect with others to see how your company is using Monday and share how we use it.

Just let me know if you’re interested and lets connect!

Hi! We also use Monday in manufacturing for managing production, inventory, and customer orders. We’ve had success with automations for task management and project timelines. I’d love to connect and share ideas, especially around sales and shipping workflows. Looking forward to hearing how you’re using Monday in your organization!

posts.author: pacificsash (Branden Johannesen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Chris, we are interested in using a board to manage our production process. We are a smaller millwork shop that manufacturers wood windows and doors. I was trying to find a template in Monday, but fell short surprisingly. If you could point us in the right direction that would be helpful. Thanks.

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Interested in discussing best practices for continuous improvement, cost out and maintenance tasks.

posts.author: stevenjhammond (Steve Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone! We’ve been using monday.com with one of our clients to create a customised MRP and inventory tracking system, and it’s been a game-changer for streamlining their operations. Recently, we’ve also launched our new app, Figment MPL, in the monday.com marketplace. It’s designed for engineering and manufacturing teams to view 3D models and drawings directly in monday.com as this was becoming an issue for our client. (Feel free to try it out - there’s a free tier) - I hope it’s useful for you!

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Christoper, would love to know if you are doing any plant maintenance tracking or what the engineering teams are tracking. Do you do PDCA, op excellence with Monday or are you guys using something else.

posts.author: CCOOPER (Cory)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are a precast concrete manufacturer and new to Monday. Trying to understand how to best setup this system to track order production, order shipping, and potential new sales from upcoming construction projects. I would appreciate any insight. Thank you!
